name: share-science
description: Empirical tip-accountability engine — aggregate public share tips, verify by outcome, publish a confidence-adjusted track record. General information only, not financial advice.

scripts.migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute share-science-db --local --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute share-science-db --local --file=migrations/0002_seed.sql
scripts.migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute share-science-db --remote --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute share-science-db --remote --file=migrations/0002_seed.sql
